SEARCH
Package com.example.eventmanager

Class Event

java.lang.Object
com.example.eventmanager.Event
public class Event extends Object
Represents an event within the lottery system. This class stores the configuration and details of an event but delegates the management of entrant lists (waiting list, selected, enrolled) to Firestore sub-collections.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    Event()
    Empty constructor required by Firebase Firestore for automatic data mapping.

    • getCapacity

      public int getCapacity()
      Gets the maximum number of attendees allowed to enroll in the event.
      Returns:
      The event capacity integer.

      Gets the device ID of the user who organized the event.

      Sets the device ID of the user who organized the event.
      Parameters:
      organizerId - The new organizer's device ID string.

    • isGeolocationRequired

      public boolean isGeolocationRequired()
      Checks if geolocation verification is required to join the waiting list.
      Returns:
      True if geolocation is required, false otherwise.

    • setGeolocationRequired

      public void setGeolocationRequired(boolean geolocationRequired)
      Sets whether geolocation verification is required to join the waiting list.
      Parameters:
      geolocationRequired - True to require geolocation, false otherwise.
